title: stephanomeria lactucina
intro: Stephanomeria lactucina, also known as white milkweed or California lace pod, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including flavonoids and sesquiterpenes, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Stephanomeria lactucina has been reported to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis and reduce oxidative stress. The plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, although its use should be carefully considered due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
